Xavier payout -- KNOWN FLOOR ONLY, not a final total. Equity-buyout component: 45% of pre-truck-reimbursement cash across all 4 active Relay accounts on 2026-04-08 ($2,253.54, the balance immediately before the 2026-04-09 $2,200 truck/insurance-reimbursement debit in account 3549 -- excluded deliberately so the truck purchase doesn't deflate Xavier's equity base) -- this anchor is independent of the departure date itself, so it is UNAFFECTED by the departure-date correction below. Owner-confirmed departure date 2026-04-30 (corrected from an initial ~2026-04-28 recollection, per H-059; still owner-recollection, not independently verified). 45% x $2,253.54 = $1,014.09. This is the ONLY component this row's value includes; the revenue-share and Anacostia components below are BLOCKED and NOT summed in here yet -- adding them without real data would overstate confidence in an unknown number, per this repo's flag-gaps-rather-than-guess rule. Consumed directly by build_model.py's High-scenario trajectory (get_assumption 'xavier_payout') as the payout event amount -- NOT reference-only, unlike the rows below.
